projects.title: Cadence
projects.description: A Notion AI / Linear-style productivity platform: kanban tasks, a week calendar, and an AI assistant that can summarize your day or create tasks from plain language. Full command palette (⌘K), keyboard shortcuts, and light/dark glassmorphism throughout.

projects.title: Ledgerly
projects.description: A Stripe/Mercury-style finance dashboard: multi-account balances, a searchable and sortable transaction ledger with CSV export, category budgets, monthly reports, and AI spending insights computed live from the underlying data — not hardcoded.

projects.title: Aurawell
projects.description: A healthcare platform with two complete role-based experiences: a patient portal (booking, medical history timeline, prescriptions, messaging) and a doctor console (today's queue, patient directory, schedule) — sharing one multi-step appointment-booking flow.

projects.title: Girls Boutique
projects.description: A full-featured PHP e-commerce boutique for women's fashion, makeup, and accessories. Features product catalog with categories, shopping cart, wishlist, checkout, admin dashboard, and MySQL database.

projects.title: DevPulse
projects.description: Real-time engineering metrics platform with CI/CD pipeline insights, team velocity charts, and deploy analytics. React + D3.js frontend, FastAPI backend, and a ClickHouse event store — runs end-to-end with docker-compose.

projects.title: ChatFlow AI
projects.description: Scalable messaging platform with real-time delivery, typing indicators, presence, and AI-powered smart replies. Next.js + Socket.io, MongoDB for history, Redis adapter for scale, OpenAI for suggestions (with a graceful fallback).

projects.title: CloudVault
projects.description: Team file storage with S3-compatible object storage, versioned metadata, and a live activity feed. React frontend, NestJS API, PostgreSQL, MinIO/S3, and WebSockets that sync every collaborator's view in real time.

projects.title: TaskForge
projects.description: A project board with columns, colored cards, and drag-and-drop across lanes (native HTML5 DnD, optimistic UI). React frontend, Express + Prisma API, PostgreSQL — auto-seeds a sample board on first boot.

projects.title: SnapNote
projects.description: A fast markdown notes app with live preview, tags, pinning, and search across titles, content, and tags. Full-stack Next.js (App Router) with Prisma and PostgreSQL.

projects.title: FitTrack
projects.description: Log workouts and watch weekly training volume, daily streaks, and activity breakdowns update as you go. React + Recharts frontend, Express API, MongoDB — seeded with sample history.

projects.title: PollWave
projects.description: Create polls and watch votes update live across every open browser. Next.js with native WebSockets, Redis pub/sub fan-out for horizontal scale, and PostgreSQL for persistence.
